description: Composition White and blue striped wrinkle free shirt, made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, a full buttoned placket, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, a patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hem Fit Slim Fit Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery The addition of refined details in this formal staple elevates this cotton shirt above the ordinary. Incorporating this spring's hottest trends from the runway into your wardrobe, this shirt tops our officewear wish list! Style this with pale chinos and understated, tonal accessories. Model Statistics The product is a size 40 on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
